case.title: AMERICAN NAT BANK OF WASHINGTON v. TAPPAN

opinion.h4: AMERICAN NAT BANK OF WASHINGTON v. TAPPAN, (1910)
opinion.p: AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK OF WASHINGTON, Plaintiff in Error, v. FANNIE N. TAPPAN. No. 837.
Supreme Court of the United States
Messrs. Horace B. Stanton and Benjamin S. Minor for plaintiff in error.
Mr. Alexander Wolf for defendant in error.
Judgment affirmed with costs, without opinion.
